sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64640" key="makroghra/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρο-γηράω</orth>, <sense id="n64640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">attain extreme old age</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">89.19</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(vi A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
